description: Performance Risk: Detect runtime performance regressions such as N+1 queries and hot-path inefficiencies.

fixtures.notes: Calls .Where().ToList() inside a foreach loop over a large product catalog, creating an N+1 query pattern.
Calls repository.FindAll() (full table scan) inside a per-item processing loop, causing O(n²) database calls.
Single O(1) dictionary lookup in a non-hot initialization path — no performance concern.
Adds an in-memory cache that reduces repeated expensive computations — this is a performance improvement.
Uses LINQ .Count() > 0 instead of .Any() inside a loop, causing unnecessary full enumeration each iteration.
